SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BackpressureException
Thrown when an edge cannot accept an item under a fail-fast pressure policy.
Batch<T>
Read-only view of items delivered to a batch stage callback.
BatchPolicy
Describes how a batch stage collects input before invoking user logic.
BatchPolicy.BatchKind
Batch collection modes.
BatchStageLogic<I,O>
User callback for batch stage processing.
BroadcastSpec<T>
Configures a broadcast routing stage.
BroadcastSpec.BroadcastKind
Broadcast delivery modes.
DiagnosticsSpec
Graph-level diagnostic event controls.
DispatchSpec<T>
Configures a dispatch routing stage.
DispatchSpec.DispatchKind
Dispatch selection modes.
EdgeMetrics
Live metrics for one edge.
EdgeSpec
Immutable configuration for an edge between graph nodes.
EdgeSpec.EdgeKind
Edge implementation families supported by the public API.
Emitter<T>
Publishes items into a normal graph source.
FusionSpec
Graph-level fusion controls.
GraphBuildException
Thrown when a graph plan cannot be compiled or validated.
GraphMetrics
Live metrics for one graph instance.
GraphMetrics.StagePlacement
Stage placement row used by GraphMetrics.placementReport().
GraphPlacementSpec
Graph-level controls for runtime-derived placement behavior.
GraphPlan
Immutable description of a graph after validation and compilation.
GraphPlan.Edge
Immutable edge metadata in a compiled graph plan.
GraphPlan.Node
Immutable node metadata in a compiled graph plan.
GraphPlan.NodeKind
Logical node kinds supported by the public graph DSL.
GraphPlan.Placement
Requested placement metadata for one stage worker.
GraphRuntimeException
Thrown when a built graph rejects an invalid runtime operation.
GraphState
Lifecycle states exposed by StaticGraph.state().
JoinGroup
Values delivered to a join combiner for one stamp.
JoinSpec<O>
Configures a join stage.
JoinSpec.DuplicatePolicy
Handling for duplicate values from the same branch and stamp.
JoinSpec.JoinKind
 
JoinSpec.MissingBranchPolicy
Handling for groups that cannot receive every expected branch.
MemoryMode
Declares where edge slot or handle metadata is allocated.
MemoryMode.MemoryKind
Memory allocation families.
MetricsSpec
Graph-level metrics controls.
NativeCapabilities
Capability bits reported by the loaded native topology library.
NativeTopology
Java 21 wrapper for worker-bootstrap native operations: CPU affinity, NUMA diagnostics, local allocation policy, and first-touch memory placement.
NativeTopologyException
Raised when a native topology operation is available but the operating system rejects it, for example because a CPU is outside the process cpuset.
NativeTopologySnapshot
Process-local native topology observations captured for graph and worker startup.
NativeTopologySnapshot.CpuCounts
 
NativeTopologySnapshot.CpuTopology
 
NativeTopologyUnavailableException
Raised when the static topology native library cannot be loaded or the host platform does not implement the requested native operation.
Output<T>
Publishes stage outputs to the stage's outgoing edge.
OverflowPolicy
Immutable policy for writes to a full edge.
OverflowPolicy.OverflowKind
Full-edge behaviors.
PartitionSpec<T,K>
Configures keyed partitioning across a fixed number of lanes.
PinPolicy
Declares preferred CPU or NUMA placement for a stage worker.
PinPolicy.PinKind
Placement request kinds.
PlacementStatus
Outcome of applying a stage placement policy.
PreallocatedEmitter<T>
Emits objects claimed from a preallocated source pool.
PreallocationSpec<T>
Describes the object pool used by a preallocated source.
SlabHandle<T>
Reference-counted handle for a slab payload.
SlabPool<T>
Bounded pool for shared payload handles.
SourceMode
Declares how a source emitter is used by application threads.
StageContext
Runtime context passed to stage callbacks.
StageExceptionAction
Runtime response chosen by a StageExceptionHandler.
StageExceptionHandler
Handles exceptions thrown by stage callbacks.
StageHandle
Lightweight public handle for a named stage.
StageLogic<I,O>
User callback for single-message stage processing.
StageMetrics
Live metrics for one stage worker.
StageSpec
Immutable configuration for a graph worker stage.
StageSpec.StageExecution
Stage execution models.
Stamped<T>
Payload wrapper with a primitive long stamp.
StaticGraph
A compiled static topology graph.
StaticGraph.Builder
Builder for a validated, immutable static topology.
WaitMetrics
Sink for wait-strategy counters.
WaitSpec
Describes how a worker or edge writer waits when no immediate progress is possible.
WaitSpec.WaitKind
Wait strategy families.
WorkerState
Observable lifecycle state for a stage worker.
